001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.dto;
002
003import java.net.URL;
004import java.time.Instant;
005import java.util.UUID;
006
007/**
008 * DTO representing a user profile response enriched with the total number of reports owned
009 * by the user.
010 *
011 * @param externalId server-side external identifier.
012 * @param displayName user display name.
013 * @param email user email address.
014 * @param avatar avatar URL, if set.
015 * @param manager whether the user has manager privileges.
016 * @param timeCreated timestamp when the profile was created.
017 * @param userEnabled whether the user is enabled.
018 * @param reportCount total number of issue reports belonging to the user.
019 */
020public record UserProfileResponse(
021    UUID externalId,
022    String displayName,
023    String email,
024    URL avatar,
025    boolean manager,
026    Instant timeCreated,
027    boolean userEnabled,
028    long reportCount
029) {
030}
